(DEVICE FILE: 30PS_IMX274_0_FPC30_0R5_BACK_30)

PACKAGE FPC30_0R5_BACK
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 32

PINORDER 30PS_IMX274_0_FPC30_0R5_BACK_30 CMMCLK CMRST GND1 GND2 GND3 GND4 GND5 GND6 GND7 HREF M1 M2,
      MIPI_CN MIPI_CP MIPI_D0N MIPI_D0P MIPI_D1N MIPI_D1P MIPI_D2N MIPI_D2P MIPI_D3N MIPI_D3P SCL,
      SDA 'VCAMIO1.8A' 'VCAMIO1.8B' VCC3V3_1 VCC3V3_2 VCC3V3_3 VCC3V3_4 VSYNC XMASTER
FUNCTION G1 30PS_IMX274_0_FPC30_0R5_BACK_30 17 19 4 7 10 13 16 18 22 20 M2 M1 3 2 9 8 15 14 12 11 6,
      5 23 24 26 25 30 29 28 27 21 1

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME 30PS_IMX274_0
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 30PS_IMX347

END
